caption: A man with dark skin and glasses is seated in what appears to be a studio or retail space, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, and a grey, tall, textured wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. The background consists of walls adorned with framed photographs and clothing racks featuring garments and a "LEE" logo. A red and white logo is superimposed on the scene, containing the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, looking slightly to his left. His facial expression remains relatively neutral, though he slightly shifts his gaze and mouth position as he appears to be listening or preparing to speak. The camera angle and the surrounding environment remain static across the frames.
